title: Blue Shield of California Theater - YBCA
content: Yerba Buena Center for the Arts. ## Blue Shield of California Theater. With the shared belief that art, creativity, and culture have measurable impacts on individual and community health, we have entered into a multi-year partnership with Blue Shield of California which began with our namesake theater being renamed The Blue Shield of California Theater at YBCA in April 2019. To strengthen the resiliency and vitality of our communities, we have committed to presenting a series of free public events that demonstrate our belief in art and its role in delivering healthy outcomes. #### 700 Howard Street San Francisco, CA 94103. © 2026 YBCA Terms of Use. ## **Want to know what’s happening first?**. Sign up for YBCA newsletters, and you’ll be entered into our monthly drawing for a free membership!
